name: Flaming Blade
description: This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: Flaming Sword
granted_actions.effects: This action deals +2 damage for each raise instead of +1. The target gains a Suppressed token and a Burning token. Discard this upgrade.

triggers.name: Enthralled
triggers.text: After killing, summon a Witchling Stalker with 4 health in base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: The signature action symbol (f) is indicated in the card with a special icon before 'Flaming Sword'
The trigger timing is inferred as 'after_succeeding' based on the 'After killing' language, which occurs after a successful kill
